# kCMFormatDescriptionError_ValueNotAvailable

**Global Variable**

An error that indicates the format description doesn’t contain the value you request.

## Declaration

```swift
var kCMFormatDescriptionError_ValueNotAvailable: OSStatus { get }
```
title: kCMFormatDescriptionError_ValueNotAvailable
